case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. AMIJO, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT AMIJO, DAVID STEVENS, BURTON KOCOVIS, ALAN DOES 1 TO 4 FOWLIE, ROBERT W. SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMIJO, DAVID STEVENS, BURTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 811 PIERCE ST. #5, STAYED UNTIL FEB-23-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANTS, DAVID AMIJO, BURTON STEVENS AND ROBERT FOWLING DO NOT VACATE PREMISES AT 411 PIERCE STREET, #5 SAN FRANCISCO BY 5 PM ON FEB. 23, 1994, PLAINTIFF NEVEO MOSSER SHALL BE ENTITLED TO A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $1,500 AND COSTS OF SUIT.
